ddls:
CREATE TABLE "snowboards" (
  "snowboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each snowboard model */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand name of the snowboard */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model name of the snowboard */,
  "board_size" TEXT /* Size of the snowboard in cm */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the snowboard (e.g., all-mountain, freestyle, freeride) */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the snowboard */,
  "shape" TEXT /* Shape of the snowboard (e.g., directional, twin tip) */,
  "flex" TEXT /* Flexibility level of the snowboard (e.g., soft, medium, stiff) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the snowboard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the snowboard */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the snowboard */,
  "image" TEXT /* Image URL of the snowboard */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the snowboard was added to the inventory */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the snowboard information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("snowboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizing_recommendations" (
  "sizing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sizing recommendation */,
  "snowboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the snowboard model the sizing recommendation belongs to */,
  "height_range" TEXT /* Height range for the sizing recommendation (e.g., 3'7"-4'5") */,
  "weight_range" TEXT /* Weight range for the sizing recommendation (e.g., <80) */,
  "boot_size_mens" TEXT /* Boot size range for men (e.g., <5.5) */,
  "boot_size_womens" TEXT /* Boot size range for women (e.g., <7.5) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the sizing recommendation is for (e.g., male, female, unisex) */,
  "skill_level" TEXT /* Skill level the sizing recommendation is for (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the sizing recommendation was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the sizing recommendation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sizing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizing_recommendations_snowboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("snowboard_id") REFERENCES snowboards ("snowboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the customer account */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the customer */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the customer */,
  "boot_size" TEXT /* Boot size of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered, canceled) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the order was placed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the order information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the order item belongs to */,
  "snowboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the snowboard the order item is for */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the snowboard ordered */,
  "price_at_purchase" REAL /* Price of the snowboard at the time of purchase */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the snowboard */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the order item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the order item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_snowboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("snowboard_id") REFERENCES snowboards ("snowboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who left the review */,
  "snowboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the snowboard the review is for */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "pros" TEXT /* Pros mentioned in the review */,
  "cons" TEXT /* Cons mentioned in the review */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review text left by the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was left */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_snowboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("snowboard_id") REFERENCES snowboards ("snowboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
